name: sap agents list
body_template: {"query":"SELECT SlpCode, SlpName, Active, Memo FROM dbo.OSLP ORDER BY SlpName OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}}}}

name: sap customers list
body_template: {"query":"SELECT c.CardCode, c.CardName, c.CardType, c.GroupCode, c.Phone1, c.E_Mail, c.Address, c.City, c.Country, c.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName FROM dbo.OCRD c LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = c.SlpCode WHERE c.CardType = 'C' ORDER BY c.CardCode OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}}}}
